title: Approval buttons component with loading states and styling
purpose: Provides a reusable component for displaying action buttons with different styles, loading states, and configurable alignment and spacing.
module_context: Exports an ApprovalButtons component that accepts action configurations, alignment, spacing, and styling options. Also exports interfaces for ApprovalAction and ApprovalButtonsProps.

steps.content: Initialize the loading state for tracking which action is currently processing.
Define the handler for action clicks that sets loading state and calls the provided action callback.
Determine CSS classes for alignment and spacing based on provided props.
Render a container div with flex layout and configured alignment and spacing.
Map over the provided actions to render individual buttons with appropriate styling.
Apply primary, destructive, or default styling based on action properties.
Show loading spinner and disable button during action processing.
Set the loading state to indicate this action is processing.
Call the provided action callback with the action ID.
Reset the loading state after a short delay to allow for animations.
